author: Masoud Masoumi
description: Spreadsheet-style calculator that propagates measurement uncertainty: input forms, significant figures, expanded uncertainty, uncertainty budgets, and Monte Carlo, following the GUM and its Supplement 1. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
